name: GSD Cycle
description: Five-phase structured software delivery: Discuss → Plan → Execute → Verify → Ship

tasks.task: Analyze the feature request. Identify what needs to be built, surface constraints and tradeoffs. Output: problem statement, key decisions, constraints.
Decompose the work into parallel-executable tasks. Each task must fit in a clean context window. Output: numbered task list with estimates, verification checklist.
Implement the highest-priority tasks from the plan. Write complete tested code with no TODOs.
Implement the remaining tasks. Ensure all integration points are connected.
Write tests for all new functionality. Verify edge cases are covered.
Walk through everything built. Run tests, check types, review output. Diagnose and fix issues. Report: pass/fail/fixed.
Summarize what was accomplished. List files changed. Note deferred items. Prepare the commit message and push.
